CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, value STRING);
SELECT left(value, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT left(value, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT left(value, LENGTH(value)) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT left(value, 0) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT id, left(value, 4) AS left_value FROM (SELECT value, id FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3));
SELECT left(sub.value, 2) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5) AS sub;
SELECT CONCAT('Result: ', left(value, 3)) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
CREATE TABLE test_lookup (key STRING, description STRING);
INSERT INTO test_lookup VALUES ('key1', 'Description for key1'), ('key2', 'Different description for key2');
SELECT t.id, left(t.value, 3), l.description FROM test_strings t JOIN test_lookup l ON left(t.value, 3) = 'Duc' WHERE t.id = 2;
SELECT left(t.value, 5) AS first_five, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings) AS total_count FROM test_strings t;
